profile.kicker: I believe data engineering is not about moving rows from A to B.
profile.title: It is the quiet architecture behind every decision people can trust.
profile.aboutText: A passionate Data Scientist and Analyst skilled in Python, SQL, Excel and Power BI, with a strong focus on solving business problems and enabling informed decisions.
profile.focusText: Data preparation, modelling, forecasting, reporting and practical analytical products for stakeholders.

footer.signature: Designed as a living data system

projects.title: CDC Logistics Pipeline
projects.description: A change-data-capture logistics pipeline designed to synchronize operational events, preserve data consistency and support near-real-time analytics.

projects.title: UN Agricultural Commodity Pipeline
projects.description: An end-to-end pipeline that ingests, cleans and structures United Nations agricultural commodity data for dependable analysis and reporting.

projects.title: GCP Product Review Pipeline
projects.description: A cloud-native data pipeline on Google Cloud that processes product reviews and prepares structured data for scalable analysis and insight generation.

projects.title: Snowflake Finance Data Mart
projects.description: A finance-focused analytical data mart built in Snowflake to organize business metrics, improve reporting consistency and support decision-ready analysis.

projects.title: Healthcare Provider Pipeline
projects.description: A structured healthcare data pipeline that prepares provider information for reliable downstream analytics, quality checks and operational reporting.

projects.title: E-Commerce CRM & Campaign Analytics
projects.description: An analytics solution connecting e-commerce, CRM and campaign data to measure customer behavior, marketing performance and commercial impact.

projects.title: Commodity Price Prediction ML Pipeline
projects.description: A production-oriented machine-learning pipeline for commodity price prediction, including model workflows, containerization and Kubernetes deployment.

projects.title: Performance Review of Forggith Pharmaceuticals
projects.description: A structured performance analysis translating pharmaceutical data into product, revenue and sales-team insights.
